title: Whole Grape Powder. In addition to studying changes in the urine metabolome and the gut microbiome due to consuming freeze-dried grape powder for 28 days, the whole grape powder study also reported some changes in the plasma metabolome. They identified two plasma metabolites that were significantly altered due to the grape diet. Stearic acid was elevated by 10 percent, while beta-D-glucuronic acid was decreased by 17 percent.

sentences.text: In addition to studying changes in the urine metabolome and the gut microbiome due to consuming freeze-dried grape powder for 28 days, the whole grape powder study also reported some changes in the plasma metabolome.

Stearic acid was elevated by 10 percent, while beta-D-glucuronic acid was decreased by 17 percent.
